---
title: English Phrase
description: |
  This blog collects some useful English phrases
categories:
  - Learn
author: Hao Sun
date: "04/02/2024"
image: "firework.jpeg"
image-alt: "Fireworks with a silhouette of an audience"
---

-   No muss, no fuss: 不慌不乱，没麻烦

-   Let's just drop it: 别提了

-   Out of sight, out of mind: 眼不见，心不烦

-   Call it even: 扯平了

-   Suit yourself: 随便你

-   In this day and age: 在当今时代

-   The die is cast: 改变不了了

-   I will make it worth your while: 我不会让你白费力气的

-   I am not a quitter: 我不会放弃的

-   What's it to you?: 这关你什么事

-   Keep your shirt on: 别生气，别着急

-   Bigger fish to fry: 有更重要的事情要做

-   Don't sass me: 别和我顶嘴

-   Do you have a death wish: 你想找死吗

-   I am messing with you: 我逗你玩呢

-   Suck it up: 忍忍吧

-   Keep me company: 陪我一下

-   So to speak: 可以这么说

-   ten to one: 十有八九；很有可能

-   born yesterday: 没有经验

-   I'm venting: 我在发牢骚

-   in hot water: 处在困境或者麻烦中

-   have a silver tongue: 能言善辩

-   You've gone too far: 你太过分了

-   You are the doctor: 你说的对，都听你的

-   It is your call: 由你决定

-   do a runner: 开溜

-   no spring chicken: 青春不再

-
